onboarding_description_1: Skip the clinic queues and get medical advice via secure video calls. Speak to experienced doctors and receive prescriptions or referrals from the comfort of your home.
onboarding_description_2: Order prescribed medicines with doorstep delivery or schedule in-person doctor appointments with ease—all in just a few taps.
onboarding_description_3: Access consultation history, prescriptions, and health records securely. Stay on top of your wellness with Doctor Go, your all-in-one healthcare companion.

faq_book_consultation: How do I book a consultation with a doctor?
faq_book_consultation_answer: You can book a consultation through the app by selecting "Book Appointment", choosing your preferred doctor, and selecting an available time slot. We offer both video consultations and in-clinic visits.
faq_payment_methods_answer: We accept various payment methods including credit/debit cards, bank transfers, and mobile wallets. All payments are processed securely through our platform.
faq_medical_certificates: How can I get my medical certificates and prescriptions?
faq_medical_certificates_answer: After your consultation, medical certificates and prescriptions will be available digitally in the app under "My Records". You can download and print them as needed.
faq_reschedule: What should I do if I need to reschedule my appointment?
faq_reschedule_answer: You can reschedule your appointment through the app up to 2 hours before the scheduled time. Go to "My Appointments" and select the reschedule option for your booking.
faq_data_security_answer: Yes, we take data privacy seriously. All your medical information is encrypted and stored securely following healthcare data protection standards. Only authorized healthcare providers can access your medical information.
faq_contact: How can I contact Doctor Go?
faq_contact_answer: You may contact us through our email "doctorgo@example.com"
get_consultation_faster: Get consultation faster and keep your health records up-to-date by providing accurate personal details as per ID or passport.

consent_description: By selecting "Accept", you agree to share your basic health information with our healthcare providers to enhance your care experience. This may include relevant medical history, treatment records, and consultation notes. This helps us provide better coordinated care and personalized services. If you select "Decline", you can still use our services, but some features related to integrated care management may be limited. Your privacy is important to us, and all information will be handled according to applicable healthcare privacy standards.
